questions.name: C++ - OOP: Analysis of Parameterized Constructor
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code snippet below and select the correct statements

answers.text: The object's p members x and y will be 3 and 4 respectively
The constructor is called with two arguments: 3 and 4
It is possible to create a Point object without arguments
The constructor has a return type int

questions.name: C++ - OOP: Destructor Invocation Timing
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code snippet below and select the correct statements

answers.text: The destructor for object t2 will be called at the end of the inner block
The destructor for object t1 will be called at the end of the main function
The destructor is called only at the end of the program for all objects at once
The destructor can be called manually like a regular function
